titleStmt.title: SII 24.372: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 372. (A.R. No. 66 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, CHANDANA-MAṆḌAPA, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Registers the grant of the village Niṉṉaiyūr in Kiḻaṅgu-nāḍu of Rā[ja]rā[ja] purachchāvaḍi as tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam and the recovery of Neṟuvūr and Vāṅgal from Kiḻaṅgunāṭṭār after paying off (?) dues on the same, by Rāyasam Koṇḍamarasayya towards five dishes of food offerings to god Raṅganātha. Shares are also allotted out of these to the Rāmānuja-kūṭam to feed Śrīvaishṇavas, to RēmiḍichcheṟulaAppayyaṉ in exchange for a garden, taken from him and to Pachchuva Varadayaṉ for gardening and offerings of food and garlands. The details of the date viz., Śaka 1440, Bahudhānya, Mēsha, śu, 3 Monday, Rōhiṇi, regularly correspond to 1518, A.D., April 12, Monday, f.d.t. ·13, f.d.n. ·26.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrīman mahārājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvirakṛṣṇarāyamahārāyar pṛdhuvirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śa
kābtam 1000 4 100 4 10ṉ mel cellāniṉṟa bahudhānnyasamvatsarattu meṣanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu tritiyayum somavāramum peṟṟa rohiṇi nakṣatrattu
nāḷ perumāḷ śrī raṅkanāthadevar śrī paṇṭārattukku rājasattufor rāyasattukoṇṭamarasar kuṭutta dharmmaśāsanapaṭṭayam perumāḷ śrī raṅkanātha devaṟku nammuṭai
ya Ubhayamāka Amutu ceytu Aruḷukiṟa Avasara kaṭṭaḷaikku tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamākac cetta Irārāpuraccāvaṭi kiḻaṅkunāṭu niṉṉaiyūr grāmam Oṉṟukku nāḷ
kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nañcai puñcai nattam māvaṭai maravaṭai ṉāṭṭārkāṇikkai palacuṅkam maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa sakalādāyamum Uṭppaṭa śrī paṇṭāra
ttile sarvamānnyamāka Aṉupavittu koṇṭu Inta mutal koṇṭu paḻaiya tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam neṟuvūrilum vāṅkalilum kiḻaṅkunāṭṭār
kāṇikkai vāṅkukiṟa mutalāy Inta Avasarakkaṭṭaḷaikku nām kaḻittukkuṭutta poṉ Aṉpatum Uṭpaṭakkaṇṭu koṇṭu perumāḷ nammuṭaiya A
vasaramāka Amutu ceytaruḷum taḷikai Añcukku kaṭṭaḷaippaṭi Amutupaṭi paruppuRead paruppamutumutu kaṟiyamutu neyyamutu sambhāram mutalāḷa sakalpatā
ṟtamum Aṭaikkāyamutu Ilaiyamutum kuṟaiyaṟa viṭṭu Amutu ceytaruḷakkaṭavatākavum Inta Añcu taḷikai prasātattukku viṭṭavaṉ vi
ḻukkāṭu Irāmāṉujayyaṅkār Irāmāṉujakūṭattile śrī vayiṣṇavarkaḷ Amutu ceyyiṟa kaṭṭaḷaikku Oru taḷikai prasādamum nām re
miṭicceṟula Appaiyaṉ kaiyile vāṅkikkoṇṭa toppukkāka Appaiyaṉukku Araittaḷiṉaka prasādamum nammuṭaiya perāle
Intat toppup payiṟ ceytu kaṟiyamutu tirumālai naṭattukiṟa paccuva vātayaṉukku Araittaḷikai prasātamum Āka Iraṇṭu taḷikai prasādamum naṭa
tti Intak kaṭṭaḷaiyile Ācandrārkka sthāyiyāka naṭakkakkaṭavatākavum §
Digital edition of SII 24.372 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
